14:["$","p",null,{"children":["Only the fields you provide will be changed. Returns ",["$","code",null,{"children":"True"}]," on success."]}]
15:["$","h3",null,{"children":"invalidate"}]

18:["$","p",null,{"children":["Sets the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"superseded_by"}]," field on the target memory, signalling that it is no longer the canonical version. Pass a ",["$","code",null,{"children":"replacement_id"}]," to link to the new memory."]}]
19:["$","h3",null,{"children":"sleep"}]
1a:["$","p",null,{"children":"Run the sleep/consolidation cycle — groups working memories by source, summarizes them, promotes to episodic memory, and evicts originals."}]
